definition: reference to an international, regional, national standard, regulation, directive, or organization based specification etc to which an object shall be made

definition_ml.en: reference to an international, regional, national standard, regulation, directive, or organization based specification etc to which an object shall be made

note: ADA081 to be used in conjunction with ADA082

note_ml.en: ADA081 to be used in conjunction with ADA082

remark: Examples of formats for reference to specifications:, IEC 81346-2:2009; ISO 9000:2005; BS EN 61175:2006; ANSI/API STD 614 PT 1:2007; MIL-STD-704F:2004;VDE 0100-100:2009; UL 1004-4:2015; SN 20512:2011
